requirement_text:
Organisation: Feuji Software Solution Pvt. Ltd.
Segment: Healthcare

AI SUGGESTED & EDITED PARAMETERS:
APP TYPE: Conversational AI Chatbot
SEGMENT: Healthcare
PROBLEM STATEMENT: Develop a Medical Chatbot application featuring five specialized agents: Cancer Care, Diabetes, Mental Illness, Cardiovascular, and Respiratory. Utilize CDC and PubMed as RAG databases and include features such as chat message download, prescription download, voice input through a microphone button, and support for multimodal and multilingual interactions in Hindi, English, and Spanish.
TOOLS AND TECH STACKS: Python, FastAPI, React, PostgreSQL for robust backend and frontend development
KNOWLEDGE BASE SOURCES: Centers for Disease Control and Prevention (CDC), PubMed for reliable medical information
LLM FOUNDATION MODEL: GPT-4, Claude 3.5 Sonnet for advanced natural language understanding and generation
PERSONA AND TONE: Compassionate, knowledgeable, and supportive to facilitate empathetic and informative patient interactions
SUPPORTED LANGUAGES: Hindi, English, Spanish to cater to a wider demographic reach
PERSONA SPECIALISTS AGENT: Specialized agent support for Cancer, Diabetes, Mental Illness, Cardiovascu

acceptance_criteria.then: Validate & sanitise all inputs against the declared schema.
Log every decision/response immutably for audit.
Produce cluster/anomaly assignments with a quality score.
Persist the fitted model + assignment for each input row.

architecture.excerpt:
%% Forge Solution Architecture — MC / Medical Chatbot
%% Derived from SOW + BRD + Backlog + Brief (chatbot)
%% Domains: Cancer Care, Diabetes, Mental Illness, Cardiology, Respiratory
%% Stories: S1, S2, S3, S4, S5, S5

%% C4 Context
flowchart LR
  ACT0([Patient])
  ACT1([Clinician])
  GW[API Gateway]
  ORC[MC Orchestrator]
  ACT0 --> GW
  GW --> ORC
  SAFE[Safety Guardrails]
  ORC --> SAFE
  AG1[Cancer Care Agent]
  ORC --> AG1
  AG2[Diabetes Agent]
  ORC --> AG2
  AG3[Mental Illness Agent]
  ORC --> AG3
  AG4[Cardiology Agent]
  ORC --> AG4
  AG5[Respiratory Agent]
  ORC --> AG5
  RAG[RAG Retriever]
  ORC --> RAG
  KB[Knowledge: CDC, PubMed, Jira]
  ORC --> KB
  LLM[LLM Response Composer]
  ORC --> LLM
  UX[Chat Portal UI]
  ORC --> UX
  UX --> ACT0
  EXP[Export: Chat + Rx]
  ORC --> EXP
  MM[Multimodal / Voice Ingest]
  ORC --> MM
  EXT3[Jira]
  ORC -.-> EXT3
  EXT4[GitHub]
  ORC -.-> EXT4
  OOS[/Out of scope: n/a/]
  ORC -.-> OOS

%% Sequence
sequenceDiagram
  participant User
  participant Portal as Chat Portal
  participant ORC as Orchestrator
  participant SAFE as Guardrails
  participant AG as Cancer Care Agent
  participant RAG as RAG Retriever
  participant KB as Knowledge Base
  participant LLM as LLM Composer
  User->>Portal: Cancer Care specialty agent + RAG citations
  Portal->>ORC: chat message + language
  ORC->>SAFE: safety / escalation check
  ORC->>AG: route by specialty/domain
  AG->>RAG: retrieve context
  RAG->>KB: query CDC, PubMed
  KB-->>RAG: passages
